items.title: Offline banner reusable
items.scope: frontend — migrate offline_banner reusable (bTHvM0/bTHvT0): connectivity notice bar, dismiss/action control, and visibility workflow parity without backend changes
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: OfflineBanner.vue renders bTHvT0 element tree with data-bubble-id on root group and text node bTHEc
AC-2: Banner visibility toggles from frontend online/offline state matching Bubble show/hide semantics on bTHEi
AC-3: Typography and bgcolor use style_ref tokens from ir/slices/styles.json (Group_section_ / surface tokens) — no placeholder colors
items.layout_notes: Tiny reusable (~3 entities); fixed top or inline banner — preserve fit_width fluid layout from IR, not literal 0px widths.

items.title: Sidebar navigation reusable
items.scope: frontend — migrate sidebar__4bbb40 reusable (ai_RNbBKLUe): mode indicator, primary nav links (dashboard, journal, paths, chat, settings), and active-route highlighting
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Sidebar.vue preserves ai_RNbBHWkU sidebar-top hierarchy with data-bubble-id on root and Group_sidebar_ style_ref applied
AC-2: Nav links ai_RNbBHWkZ/kc/kf/ki/kl route to /dashboard, /chat, /journal, /paths, /settings with labels from ENUM-01 maps
AC-3: sidebar-mode-indicator group (ai_RNbBHWkV) renders mode label/value text nodes ai_RNbBHWkW/ai_RNbBHWkX with IR copy
items.layout_notes: Vertical nav column with right border from Group_sidebar_; active link state mirrors Bubble conditional styles on nav links.

items.title: Header bar, nav, and profile menu
items.scope: frontend — migrate header reusable (ai_RNbBKLUc) chrome regions: brand, logged-out marketing nav, logged-in app nav links, header actions, avatar, and profile dropdown — excluding login/signup popups
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Header.vue root carries data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUc with child regions header-brand (ai_RNbBHWao), header-nav-loggedin (ai_RNbBHWaz), and header-actions (ai_RNbBHWbE) preserving IR nesting
AC-2: Logged-in nav links ai_RNbBHWbA/bB/bC/bD mirror Bubble routes to dashboard, chat, journal, and paths
AC-3: Profile dropdown group ai_RNbBHWbJ and GroupFocus ai_RNbBHWfD open on avatar click with settings link ai_RNbBHWbL and logout control ai_RNbBHWbO wired to Supabase signOut
items.layout_notes: Header is horizontal flex: brand left, nav center/right, actions far right. Logged-out groups (ai_RNbBHWau) hidden when authenticated; dropdown stacks above content with Bubble z-index.

items.title: Header login and signup popups
items.scope: frontend — migrate header reusable login-popup and signup-popup overlays (ai_RNbBHWbR, ai_RNbBHWbk) including form fields, step groups, and open/close workflows triggered from header actions
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Login popup ai_RNbBHWbR renders popup hierarchy from element_definitions/ai_RNbBKLUd with data-bubble-id on popup root and email/password inputs ai_RNbBHWbc/bf
AC-2: Signup popup ai_RNbBHWbk preserves multi-step signup-step groups and close button ai_RNbBHWbq with IR labels
AC-3: header-login-btn ai_RNbBHWbF and header-signup-btn ai_RNbBHWbG open respective popups; successful auth closes popup and routes per AUTH module parity
items.layout_notes: Modal popups centered overlay using Group_overlay_ style; signup multi-step sections swap visibility — do not flatten into a single form.

items.title: App shell layout and auth guard
items.scope: frontend — compose Header, Sidebar, and OfflineBanner into authenticated AppShellLayout with router outlet, auth guard redirecting unauthenticated users to /, and offline banner mount point shared across SPA pages
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: AppShellLayout.vue mounts OfflineBanner, Header (ai_RNbBKLUc), and Sidebar (ai_RNbBKLUe) with data-bubble-id markers on each reusable root
AC-2: Router meta requiresAuth wraps authenticated routes; unauthenticated access redirects to / per Bubble logged-out behavior
AC-3: Layout preserves sidebar + main content column structure seen on bTHDU/bTHDb page slices — main region flex-grows with fluid width
items.layout_notes: Classic app shell: optional offline banner top, header full width, sidebar fixed left (~Group_sidebar_ width), scrollable main content right.

items.title: Dashboard page shell and route
items.scope: frontend — register /dashboard route and page shell for dashboard page (bTHDT/bTHDU): mount header instance ai_RNbBKLUh, sidebar instance ai_RNbBKLUi, and content slot boundary at dashboard-main — no dashboard feature widgets
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route /dashboard renders inside AppShellLayout with page root data-bubble-id bTHDT
AC-2: Header and sidebar CustomElement instances carry data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUh and ai_RNbBKLUi matching bTHDU____root.json placement
AC-3: Content slot aligns to ai_RNbBHXRD dashboard-main group boundary; placeholder documents MOD-DRSAM-DASHBOARD ownership
items.layout_notes: Dashboard slice has 205 entities — this item only lands shell chrome; dashboard-main subtree deferred to dashboard module.

items.title: Journal page shell and route
items.scope: frontend — register /journal route and page shell for journal page (bTHDa/bTHDb): header ai_RNbBKLUl, sidebar ai_RNbBKLUm, content slot at journal-main — popups and journal widgets out of scope
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route /journal renders inside AppShellLayout with page root data-bubble-id bTHDa
AC-2: Shell instances data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUl and ai_RNbBKLUm preserve bTHDb____root.json CustomElement order
AC-3: Content slot boundary at ai_RNbBHXid journal-main; journal popups (entry-detail, new-entry, etc.) not implemented in this item
items.layout_notes: Journal page hosts multiple popups at page level — shell item mounts only fixed chrome; popups remain for MOD-DRSAM-JOURNAL.

items.title: Paths page shell and route
items.scope: frontend — register /paths route and page shell for paths page (bTHDf/bTHDg): header ai_RNbBKLUn, sidebar ai_RNbBKLUo, content slot at paths main group — path tabs and enrollment UI deferred
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route /paths renders inside AppShellLayout with page root data-bubble-id bTHDf
AC-2: Shell instances data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUn and ai_RNbBKLUo match bTHDg____root.json hierarchy
AC-3: Content slot aligns to ai_RNbBHYGq main group; path_page_tab_os_ tab UI deferred to MOD-DRSAM-PATHS
items.layout_notes: Paths slice (228 entities) — shell only. FloatingGroup FG-services remains outside shell scope.

items.title: Settings page shell and route
items.scope: frontend — register /settings route and page shell for settings page (bTHDh/bTHDl): header ai_RNbBKLUp, sidebar ai_RNbBKLUq, content slot at settings-main — tab panels and admin popups deferred
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route /settings renders inside AppShellLayout with page root data-bubble-id bTHDh
AC-2: Shell instances data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUp and ai_RNbBKLUq preserve bTHDl____root.json CustomElement placement
AC-3: Content slot boundary at ai_RNbBHYUr settings-main; settings_tab_os_ tab router stub exported for MOD-DRSAM-SETTINGS
items.layout_notes: Largest page slice (669 entities) — shell item avoids settings tab content and add/delete popups nested under bTHDl.

items.title: Chat page shell and route
items.scope: frontend — register /chat route and page shell for chat page (bTHDV/bTHDZ): header ai_RNbBKLUj, sidebar ai_RNbBKLUk, content slot at chat-main — conversation UI deferred
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Route /chat renders inside AppShellLayout with page root data-bubble-id bTHDV
AC-2: Shell instances data-bubble-id ai_RNbBKLUj and ai_RNbBKLUk match bTHDZ____root.json order
AC-3: Content slot boundary at ai_RNbBHXbD chat-main; chat-delete-popup and thread UI deferred to MOD-DRSAM-CHAT
items.layout_notes: Smallest authenticated page slice (87 entities) — shell mounts chrome only; chat panel subtree owned by chat module.
